message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A close-up portrait of a man with short dark hair, a trimmed beard, and light-colored eyes wearing a green crew-neck shirt. The left side of his face is visible against a dark background, showing skin texture, facial hair, and the detail of his left eye, while the right side of his face is concealed in shadow.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up portrait of a man with short dark hair, a trimmed beard, and light-colored eyes wearing a green crew-neck shirt, rendered with extreme underexposure that crushes the right half of his face into near-total blackness. The illuminated left side reveals skin texture, facial hair, and an amber eye against a dark background, while the severe loss of shadow detail creates a stark, moody, and graphically simplified effect.
